_comment: Mode B settings: declarative deny rules + dynamic guard hook. Layer 1 (deny rules) cannot be overridden by a hook allow; layer 2 (PreToolUse hook) blocks even in bypassPermissions. The hook matcher is "*" (match all tools), not "Bash": the guard also carries the HALT kill-switch, which must neutralise a run in flight across Edit/Write too, not only shell-outs. Verify at wiring time that CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR expands in your Claude Code version; hook $VARs not allowlisted expand to empty string.
